scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @blackstarzck/tokens && npm run build --workspace @blackstarzck/ui && npm run build --workspace @blackstarzck/docs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @blackstarzck/tokens && npm run typecheck --workspace @blackstarzck/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @blackstarzck/docs
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace @blackstarzck/tokens && npm run clean --workspace @blackstarzck/ui && npm run clean --workspace @blackstarzck/docs
